word: H2853 - חָתַל - châthal - khaw-thal' - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: חתל

Transliteration: châthal

Phonetic: khaw-thal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to entwine, enwrap, be swaddled
    1. (Pual) to be swathed, be enwraped
    2. (Hophal) to be swathed, be swaddled

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 779

Part(s) of speech: Verb
